description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a dark metallic finish and a minimalist design. The device features a large, vibrant display with thin bezels, showing a colorful abstract wallpaper. The keyboard is backlit and compact, with a spacious trackpad centered below it. The exterior lid is adorned with a prominent, glossy black Apple logo. The laptop's sides are equipped with several ports, including USB-C and a headphone jack, all seamlessly integrated into the chassis. The overall build appears robust and premium, suitable for both professional and casual urban environments.
description: A modern, dark metallic laptop with a vibrant display, backlit keyboard, and a prominent Apple logo on the lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open laptop with a colorful screen, backlit keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile, visible ports, and the open screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed lid with a centered Apple logo and no visible ports or screen.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard, trackpad, and additional ports on the side.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the exterior lid, shaped as a stylized apple with a bite taken out of the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a colorful abstract wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad, featuring backlit keys.
